File Information
Collection: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level
Environment: Development Environment
Collection Description
Enterprise-grade API testing framework demonstrating advanced testing practices: **Features:** - Custom Validation Library (15+ validation functions) - Test Data Factory Pattern - Advanced Error Handling (Retry, Circuit Breaker, Rate Limiting) - Business Rule Validation - Cross-Request Data Correlation - JSON Schema Validation - Performance Testing - Data-Driven Testing Support **Business Scenario:** E-commerce Order Management System **Test Coverage:** - 60 Requests across 7 modules - 280+ Assertions - Complete business workflow testing **Author:** Michael Zhou **Version:** 1.0.0 **Created:** 2026-02-25 **Updated:** 2026-02-28
